expectations.text: The response defaults to Solana without needing to ask the user
expectations.evidence: Correctly defaulted to --chain solana per skill Step 1: 'Missing chain → default to Solana'. Did not ask user.

expectations.text: The response does NOT ask the user which chain they want for a basic trenches scan
expectations.evidence: Proceeded directly with Solana default, no chain question asked.

expectations.text: The response uses memepump tokens command with stage NEW
expectations.evidence: Used onchainos memepump tokens --chain solana --stage NEW. Translated field names correctly (bondingPercent, top10HoldingsPercent, rugPullCount).
